description_long: This is a double-headed battle axe with a robust, dark metallic handle and ornate golden accents. The axe features two large, symmetrical crescent-shaped blades, each with a weathered, mottled finish and a central spike protruding from the top. The handle is cylindrical, segmented with decorative bands, and appears to be wrapped or textured for grip. The central shaft is reinforced and tapers slightly towards the ends, with a rounded pommel at the base. The overall design is both functional and decorative, suggesting ceremonial or display use as well as practical application. The color palette includes dark steel, gold, and hints of brown, giving the axe an antique, formidable appearance.
description: A double-headed battle axe with ornate gold accents, dark metallic handle, and weathered crescent blades. The design is both functional and decorative.
description_view_0: Front view showing both crescent blades, central spike, and detailed handle with gold accents.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin blade profile and cylindrical handle, with minimal blade width visible.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, displaying the symmetrical double blades and central spike.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the thin blade profile and handle details.
attribute_handle_type: Cylindrical, straight handle with dark metallic finish, segmented with gold decorative bands, textured or wrapped for grip, round cross-section.
attribute_blade_design: Double crescent-shaped blades with a central spike, symmetrical, weathered finish, no beard, decorative gold elements, sharp edges.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged and pinned mounting with visible decorative fittings at the blade-handle junction.
